function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I found the canonical home-assistant project as `40_projects/2026_04_02_house_mesh/README.MD`, but I could not identify any canonical `40_projects/*/README.MD` for a sailboat refit notebook. Without two canonical project records, I can’t compare start dates or choose a deletion target.
function.rulebook_notes: `process-next-inbox-item.md` says to verify facts against canonical lanes and stop if ambiguous/missing canonical support. `deletion-and-wiping.md` says if visible evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file, stop and ask for clarification.
function.outcome_justification: The request requires comparing two project start points, but only one canonical project record was identified. Deleting any project now would require guessing, which the deletion workflow forbids.
